Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-27-2009 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-13-2009 Continued To Jul-27-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg appeared for Bruce Feder for the Jewish Family And Childrens Services.

Ms. Friedeberg appeared for the purpose of requesting a two week continuance. The matter was continued to July 27, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR#7489. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-15-2009 Continued To Jul-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (370 Lansdale Ave, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Dec-31-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for Jewish Family and Childrens Services (JFCS). Donna Adams from JFCS.

Ms. Friedeberg stated for the record the terms of the sale. The sale was confirmed at $713,700.00. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). No additional bond was required as the net proceeds from the sale do not exceed the amount of the current bond.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.

Petition For Authority To Sell Real Property Without Publication
Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
